## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes (from `src-tauri/`)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (no type errors)
- [ ] `npx vite build` succeeds
- [ ] `cargo fmt` / `cargo clippy` run (no new warnings)
- [ ] New UI strings added to `src/i18n.ts` (`en`) and kept in sync across locales
- [ ] The change is focused (one feature/fix) and matches the surrounding style
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or credentials added
